image_prompt: Cinematic long shot gliding slowly over rain-slicked Wall Street at twilight, golden light bleeding dramatically from towering skyscraper windows onto silent, empty streets below. Deep shadows, atmospheric haze, faint metallic glint of floating dollar and currency symbols in the air, evoking quiet, inexorable power in ultra-realistic 8K detail.

Slow dissolve into dimly lit archival gold vaults, towering stacks of gleaming gold bars filling the frame under warm overhead lights. Deep shadows and atmospheric haze, metallic reflections and glints on the bullion, evoking the quiet, inexorable power of stored wealth in cinematic, film-grain style.

Streams of glowing digital code, binary numbers, and financial data flowing like luminous rivers across a holographic global world map. Currency symbols and dollar signs shimmering as they connect continents, deep shadows and atmospheric haze, evoking quiet, inexorable digital power in futuristic cinematic style.
